<table style="width: 500px;">
	<tbody>
		<tr>
			<td style="width: 100%; text-align: center; border-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-style: double; border-width: 1px; vertical-align: top;"><span style="font-size: 24px;"><strong><span style='color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: "comic sans ms", sans-serif;'>HELLO IM SILVER / EX !</span></strong>
				</span><span style="font-family: comic sans ms,sans-serif;"><br><span style="font-size: 14px;"><strong><span style="color: rgb(255, 255, 255);">my main fandoms are Puyo Puyo Tetris, Die of Death, Fanime, Flood Escape, Umamusume, Yu-Gi-Oh!, Roblox overall, And Pokemon.</span></strong>
				</span>
				<br><span style="font-size: 14px;"><strong><span style="color: rgb(255, 255, 255);">i just really like things :)</span></strong>
				</span>
				<br>
				<br><span style="font-size: 14px;"><strong><span style="color: rgb(255, 255, 255);">i can be found near / in the bakery or walking around the map in the pg server !!</span></strong>
				</span>
				<br>
				<br><span style="font-size: 14px;"><strong><span style="color: rgb(255, 255, 255);">cuddle with me / hide behind me but dont cover me !!! :(((((</span></strong>
				</span>
				<br>
				<br><span style="font-size: 14px;"><strong><span style="color: rgb(255, 255, 255);">dont be weird !! im basically 40 years old !!&nbsp;</span></strong>
				</span>
				<br>
				</span><span style="font-size: 14px;"><strong><span style='color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: "comic sans ms", sans-serif;'>my pronouns are he/him/his and im a queer intersex man :)</span></strong>
				</span>
				<br><span style="font-size: 14px;"><strong><span style='color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: "comic sans ms", sans-serif;'>im autistic with bad memory n&#39; a system.</span></strong>
				</span>
				<br>
				<br><span style="font-size: 14px;"><strong><span style='color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: "comic sans ms", sans-serif;'>a lot of my wordings are a mess and are meant to sound like my accent &lt;:[</span></strong>
				</span>
				<br>
				<hr><img src="https://external-media.spacehey.net/media/s8xUAwKHxXvxq1HuUsxVecF-AbegOivVyC5lngpB1IAU=/https://images-wixmp-ed30a86b8c4ca887773594c2.wixmp.com/f/78d0d844-dee3-41c0-b83a-2d5cadf05458/d715pij-a1a96e5c-b99f-4a5b-b786-0b0d0cf91224.gif?token=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..vaIa2XsHzT-ehxOE9GCF1-DkVPaVB0B7hK-N5Wz0e9s" class="fr-fic fr-dii" width="99" height="56"><img src="https://external-media.spacehey.net/media/sgyYY1oKf58QXo0E3fKpuTLEl50anr7urbPfnA7XPutI=/https://images-wixmp-ed30a86b8c4ca887773594c2.wixmp.com/f/5e1d6872-cbd7-4288-b196-6756be144929/d7t7819-5268a3d5-d39a-4167-a953-77b14f7db0ab.png?token=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..vScBdU1JoOQ7Oxz8k-apCyO7fJ97ZA2KE4cl5GSdDVU" class="fr-fic fr-dii" width="99" height="56"><img src="https://external-media.spacehey.net/media/sP2rH2tXlrwIsG45-lGNF6uvFYLx4T_xZOzSduzMy27I=/https://images-wixmp-ed30a86b8c4ca887773594c2.wixmp.com/f/361b7274-ec49-438a-90d7-a5e6a48e7dcb/dgadumj-4ec800d2-eda3-4fe2-b9ac-a64272b61f04.png/v1/fill/w_99,h_56,q_80,strp/guilty_gear_xrd_alt__elphelt_stamp_by_chaos_husband_dgadumj-fullview.jpg?token=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.._r2oZyQWUDrQS-UY7YlglGCru9yD1sE59W9KGnJTmnQ" class="fr-fic fr-dii" width="99" height="56"><img src="https://external-media.spacehey.net/media/sndeSsLHUtx2XDpbMcVbASCfxT-2NhcFivj8dS0Fv_T4=/https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExbXV0aDBzM2s1MjBxdTBrbDBqY2trOGNuMHd1OXg4cXpmZG53ZHkzciZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/2dpcQjMhfcdQWYDTUC/giphy.gif" class="fr-fic fr-dii" width="100" height="55">
				<br><img src="https://external-media.spacehey.net/media/salGl5EKY3GU3HIdHxTA9Wh9nqv3vOv7ycZQuOEgQ-oQ=/https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExeDczbmNmNWp5Y2UwbjJ0MzhxNHo5aXVkdTZlYmhkdnQ1Z2o4OWg0aSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/KibxGDwo2dp97b7Iz4/giphy.gif" class="fr-fic fr-dii" width="110" height="60.5"><img src="https://external-media.spacehey.net/media/sqCoaHcZVK4IjhR5JForaOuC0GXw4KbSMo0qvuBjgRZQ=/https://images-wixmp-ed30a86b8c4ca887773594c2.wixmp.com/f/57d70805-4437-4b90-b2e9-93b94b352cd2/d4ayouo-8cc598d2-b801-4f0b-990f-1718b7809326.gif?token=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..VpntY72RiiY24cAPgxOO6ae66Rmk5-ATmZ_axN4_9tA" class="fr-fic fr-dii" width="99" height="57"><img src="https://external-media.spacehey.net/media/seJHHaj0B8CFfhQy38I9Qbq1tGj6q9Eq2-K2s1xvGM44=/https://media3.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExOTBnNXlra2l1MmRzdW40bTk2dGo4MXFxbW83N3l0NjEwa3V3NDlrMSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/hO6tx1dak9DLZ9McPI/giphy.gif" class="fr-fic fr-dii" width="110" height="60.5">
				<br>i refuse to learn how to code im too lazyyy whahhhhwa wahhh&nbsp;</td>
